Qualcomm ecosystem (Gemini Nano, Copilot+, Hexagon SDK)
mediatek_leads: Generative AI throughput (111% peak NPU improvement)
BitNet 1.58-bit: run larger models with less memory/power
Power efficiency for sustained AI tasks (56% lower)
key_gaps_for_soc_strategy: On-device agent orchestration (multi-agent coordination) not yet hardware-accelerated
Cross-device seamless AI context sharing (phone-to-CPE) not native
Real-time multi-modal agent with <100ms E2E latency not demonstrated
Privacy-preserving federated learning hardware not present
CPE/router-class AI SoC with mobile parity not addressed by either
